\tzpentry{ID4400}{Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4400 introduces Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Hhat_{e\text{-}\mathrm{ph}} = \sum_{n,\sigma} \sum_q g_{n,\sigma}(q)\, c_{n,\sigma}^\dagger c_{n,\sigma}\, \bigl( b_q e^{iq s_n} + b_q^\dagger e^{-iq s_n} \bigr), \]
